memberdef.name: PRINTF
memberdef.initializer: printf /* Print macro for Linux driver */

memberdef.name: LOG
memberdef.initializer: PRINTF("RFCLK error in %s: %s", __func__, str) /* Logging macro */

memberdef.name: LMK_PORT_STATE_MAX
memberdef.initializer: 0xff /* Number of states on output port */

memberdef.argsstring: (int Iic, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XRFClk_I2CWrData

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2c write.

detaileddescription.para: If attempt fails function will repeate IIC write protocol again for DELAY_100uS microseconds multiplied by a loop index number. The procedure will be repeated NUM_IIC_RETRIES times.

parameterdescription.para: for the i2c driver.
address to be written to.
value to write.
data length.

memberdef.argsstring: (int Iic, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XRFClk_I2CRdData

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2c read.

detaileddescription.para: If attempt fails function will repeate IIC write protocol again for DELAY_100uS microseconds multiplied by a loop index number. The procedure will be repeated NUM_IIC_RETRIES times.

parameterdescription.para: descriptor for the i2c driver.
address to be read.
read value.
data length.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to open and configure i2c drivers.
This function is used to open and configure MUX_SEL GPIO drivers.
This function is used to configure SPI.
This function is used to set MUX_SEL GPIO pins to connect appropriate SPI SDO.

memberdef.argsstring: (int File, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XRFClk_I2CRdData_sub

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2c read.

parameterdescription.para: descriptor for the i2c driver.
address to be read.
read value.
data length.

memberdef.argsstring: (int File, u8 Addr, u8 *Val, u8 Len)
memberdef.name: XRFClk_I2CWrData_sub

briefdescription.para: This function is HAL API for I2c write.

parameterdescription.para: descriptor for the i2c driver.
address to be written to.
value to write.
data length.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable clk104 buses on I2C1 bus switch.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to connect MUX for read from the selected chip.

detaileddescription.para: The function also reconfigure the MUXOUT pin to act as a SPI SDO. The previous setting has been saved.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set MUXOUT pin to the original state after read completion.

detaileddescription.para: Usually the pin is set to indicate a lock state of a PLL.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to write a register on one of LMX2594 or LMX04828.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

= {D2, D1, D0} Where [D0,D1,D2] bits are: LMK04282: bit [23] - 1-bit command field (R/W) bits [22:21] - 2-bit multi-byte field (W1, W0) bits [20:8] - 13-bit address field (A12 to A0) bits [7-0]- 8-bit data field (D7 to D0). LMX2594: bit [23] - 1-bit command field (R/W) bits [22:16] - 7-bit address field (A6 to A0) bits [15-0]- 16-bit data field (D15 to D0).

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read a register from one of LMX2594 or LMX04828.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

= {D2, D1, D0} Where [D0,D1,D2] bits are: LMK04282: bit [23] - 1-bit command field (R/W) bits [22:21] - 2-bit multi-byte field (W1, W0) bits [20:8] - 13-bit address field (A12 to A0) bits [7-0]- 8-bit data field (D7 to D0). LMX2594: bit [23] - 1-bit command field (R/W) bits [22:16] - 7-bit address field (A6 to A0) bits [15-0]- 16-bit data field (D15 to D0).

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize RFCLK devices on i2c1-bus: i2c1 bus switch, i2c2spi bridge and MUX_SELx GPIOs.

simplesect.para: GpioId gpio ID for Linux build, n/a for baremetal build.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to close RFCLK devices.
This function is used to reset one of LMX2594 or LMK04828.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set config on LMK.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the config Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set config on LMX.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
indicates the config Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set a full configuration on one of LMX2594 or LMX04828 for the requested frequency.where the register settings is provided from the selected hard coded data.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
indicates the RF clock chip configuration Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the full configuration data on one of LMX2594 or LMX04828.

detaileddescription.para: The all register values are passed as a pointer CfgData, Len defines a number of data ready for writing.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
indicates the configuration for all registers.
indicates a number of data.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set a full configuration on all LMX2594 and LMK04828 or LMK04208 for the requested frequency.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the LMK configuration Id.
indicates the LMX RF1 configuration Id.
indicates the LMX RF2 configuration Id.
indicates the LMX RF3 configuration Id.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get config from LMK.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
pointer to array of data read from the chip registers.
pointer to array of data read from the chip registers.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get config from LMK.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
pointer to array of data read from the chip registers.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the full configuration data from one of LMX2594 or LMX04828.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the RF clock chip Id.
the array of the RF clock chip configuration data.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable or disable the specified output port on LMK04828.

parameterdescription.para: indicates a LMK04828 port id, [1:7].
indicates the state of the port, see chapter 9.7.2.7 in lmk04828.pdf datasheet, [0:7]

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 PortId, u32 DCLKoutX_DIV, u32 DCLKoutX_MUX, u32 SDCLKoutY_MUX, u32 SYSREF_DIV)
memberdef.name: XRFClk_ConfigOutputDividerAndMUXOnLMK

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure a clock divider and the output port MUX state on LMK04828.

detaileddescription.para: For the details consult tables 16, 18, 19 and 25 in the lmk04828.pdf datasheet.

parameterdescription.para: indicates a LMK04828 port id, [1:7].
sets divider for the clock output [0:31].
selects input to the device clk buffer [0:3].
sets input to SDCLKoutY [0:1].
sets SYSREF output divider [8:8191]
